name: MOVEit Transfer Vulnerability Exploit Commands
notes: This rule detects MOVEit transfer vulnerability exploit via command line indicator of compromise.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

when the event matches ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%post%moveitisapi.dll%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%post%guestaccess.aspx%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%post%/api/v1/folders/%files%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%get /human2.aspx%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%request headers - ''x-silock-step*''%' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY MOVEit Transfer Vulnerability Exploit Commands on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

AND when the event matches (  LOWER("Command") LIKE '%post%moveitisapi.dll%'  OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%post%guestaccess.aspx%'  OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%post%/api/v1/folders/%files%'  OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%get /human2.aspx%'  OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%request headers - ''x-silock-step*''%' ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: MOVEit Transfer Vulnerability Exploit Commands
Event description: Detects MOVEit transfer vulnerability exploit via command line indicator of compromise.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
